plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to eliminate high risk.
Trim SMH to zero and reduce CRWD and SPY to lower concentration.
Add QQQI to increase income generation.
Add ASML as a quality tech name with a good setup.
This plan aims for capital preservation with reduced leverage.
Expect lower volatility and a more defensive posture.
conservative.read: This plan prioritizes capital preservation by cutting all leveraged ETFs and reducing concentration. Expect a lower target return around 1.5% per month with significantly reduced drawdown risk.

moves.note: Reduce leveraged ETFs to small size

plan: Trim leveraged ETFs (SOXL) and sell SPAL to reduce overall leverage.
Reduce SMH and SPY to manage sector and index concentration.
Add CRWD to maintain exposure to strong software.
Add NVDA as a high-potential tech name from the scanner.
Add XOM for diversification into a defensive sector.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction.
balanced.read: This balanced approach aims for risk-first growth, targeting around 2.5% per month. It reduces leverage and concentration while adding quality names and some diversification, keeping potential drawdowns manageable.

moves.note: Reduce broad index to fund growth

plan: Increase leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to maximize upside potential.
Add to SMH and CRWD for concentration in high-conviction sectors.
Reduce broad index (SPY) and sell income (QQQI) to fund growth.
Add ZS, a top-rated scanner setup, for further tech exposure.
This plan embraces higher leverage and concentration for aggressive growth.
Expect amplified gains but also significantly larger potential drawdowns.
aggressive.read: This aggressive growth plan targets around 4% per month by increasing leverage and concentrating on high-scoring tech setups, including leveraged ETFs. Be aware that this significantly raises both potential upside and downside, with amplified drawdowns and daily decay from leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and volatile single names (CRWD, SMH).
Maximize allocation to income ETF QQQI for monthly distributions.
Increase SPY allocation for stability and some income potential.
Add XOM for defensive sector exposure and income.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly income and low drawdown.
Focus is on capital preservation and reliable cash flow.
income.read: This income-focused plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and capital preservation, targeting around 1% per month. It cuts all high-beta and leveraged assets, focusing on income ETFs and stable sectors, aiming for the lowest possible drawdown.
